records.m_Talk_ENG: Tonight's the night the phantom thief said she'd steal the painting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tonight's the night the phantom thief said she'd steal the painting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tonight's the night the phantom thief said she'd steal the painting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know when or where she's going to appear, so stay frosty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know when or where she's going to appear, so stay frosty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know when or where she's going to appear, so stay frosty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Ronald Lee, any signals on the security device?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Ronald Lee, any signals on the security device?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Ronald Lee, any signals on the security device?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Nothing has been detected yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Nothing has been detected yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Nothing has been detected yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is the thief not going to show? I hope she comes soon...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is the thief not going to show? I hope she comes soon...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is the thief not going to show? I hope she comes soon...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope she brings burgers this time too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope she brings burgers this time too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope she brings burgers this time too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this isn't a joke! Please be a little more serious!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this isn't a joke! Please be a little more serious!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this isn't a joke! Please be a little more serious!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?! The lights are out...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?! The lights are out...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?! The lights are out...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah...! I can't see a thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah...! I can't see a thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah...! I can't see a thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop frolicking around! It's making me go nuts!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop frolicking around! It's making me go nuts!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop frolicking around! It's making me go nuts!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a phantom thief-like entrance! Now, come at me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a phantom thief-like entrance! Now, come at me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a phantom thief-like entrance! Now, come at me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's dangerous, Miss Lin! You must get to safety!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's dangerous, Miss Lin! You must get to safety!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's dangerous, Miss Lin! You must get to safety!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? The lights are back on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? The lights are back on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? The lights are back on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is the painting safe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is the painting safe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is the painting safe?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, it's still here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, it's still here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, it's still here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew... Guess she couldn't get close because the lights came on too quick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew... Guess she couldn't get close because the lights came on too quick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew... Guess she couldn't get close because the lights came on too quick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Something just...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Something just...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Something just...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, I still see you're all running around like headless chickens!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, I still see you're all running around like headless chickens!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, I still see you're all running around like headless chickens!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at least you're using the skincare products I left you. I'm happy for you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at least you're using the skincare products I left you. I'm happy for you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at least you're using the skincare products I left you. I'm happy for you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phantom Thief J!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phantom Thief J!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phantom Thief J!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Long time no see. But no need to get so defensive now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long time no see. But no need to get so defensive now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long time no see. But no need to get so defensive now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was worried you might trip and get a boo-boo...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was worried you might trip and get a boo-boo...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was worried you might trip and get a boo-boo...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you treat me like a little child...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you treat me like a little child...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you treat me like a little child...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-Karin! Don't let her get into your head!
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-Karin! Don't let her get into your head!
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-Karin! Don't let her get into your head!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You're?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You're?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You're?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although I don't want to, I can't let a girl fight a thief on her own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although I don't want to, I can't let a girl fight a thief on her own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although I don't want to, I can't let a girl fight a thief on her own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since our goal of capturing her is aligned, I'll cooperate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since our goal of capturing her is aligned, I'll cooperate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since our goal of capturing her is aligned, I'll cooperate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? There's someone who looks exactly like Karin. Are you... like a hidden sibling of hers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? There's someone who looks exactly like Karin. Are you... like a hidden sibling of hers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? There's someone who looks exactly like Karin. Are you... like a hidden sibling of hers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, aren't you two funny siblings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, aren't you two funny siblings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, aren't you two funny siblings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then maybe I should flex... some of my powers in a long time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then maybe I should flex... some of my powers in a long time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then maybe I should flex... some of my powers in a long time?
